title: Molecular-Neurogenetics/truster: v0.1.2
author: Raquel Garza
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Several changes in functionality including: 
 Switch to cellranger's PCR duplicate identification
Testing for file-structure-dependent functions
Unique mapping option for TE quantification per cluster
Option for including genes to quantification
Md5sums for raw files
